heading: Regulations
label: 1439 Regulations
text: The Secretary may issue such regulations as may be necessary to carry out this chapter.
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior was classified to , prior to repeal by .section 308 of Pub. L. 92–532section 1438 of this titlesection 203(1) of Pub. L. 100–627

Amendments2000— amended section catchline and text generally. Prior to amendment, text read as follows: “If any provision of this Act or the application thereof to any person or circumstances is held invalid, the validity of the remainder of this Act and of the application of such provision to other persons and circumstances shall not be affected thereby.”Pub. L. 106–513
